form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (31.07) in a Grade 6, finishing a 7 length third. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and two places from eight starts. Makes strong appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In the money last time at this track (31.07) in a Grade 6, finishing a 7 length third. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and two places from eight starts. Makes strong appeal.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 342m in 19.60. Followed that up with a minor placing over 395m at Murray Bridge at Grade 6 a week-and-a-half ago. Should be around the mark.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 342m in 19.60. Followed that up with a minor placing over 395m at Murray Bridge at Grade 6 a week-and-a-half ago. Should be around the mark.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked first turn; Checked back straight; Checked turn into home straight.

form.formComment: Won over this track and trip. Latest effort finished 6th on April 13 over 530m at this track behind Duran Pantera beaten 8 lengths (31.44) in a Grade 6. Expected to go very well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won over this track and trip. Latest effort finished 6th on April 13 over 530m at this track behind Duran Pantera beaten 8 lengths (31.44) in a Grade 6. Expected to go very well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and dragged down first turn; Checked turn into back straight.
Checked and stumbled turn into back straight.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (35.25) at this track in a OPEN, finishing eighth and beaten 6 lengths. Still a maiden from this draw but has never missed the frame from three starts. Will need the right run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and contacted running rail first turn.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (30.93) over 531m at Gawler. Drawn out wide and prefer each-way.
